creator: john@saltant.com
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #2)

m2r's author has explicitly limited mistune support to "<2" [0], and indicated that 0.3.1 will be the project's terminal release [1].

[0] https://github.com/miyakogi/m2r/commit/de7be7969ae8baf73c71c8dff5271f5af2b63500
[1] https://github.com/miyakogi/m2r/commit/f23d0031af40f89ce588f2ba1ff14bed2629f8ac
